title: Delhi Gymkhana Club moves Delhi High Court against Central government order to vacate 27.3 acre premises
description: The Delhi Gymkhana Club has approached the Delhi High Court against a Central government order directing it to vacate its 27.3-acre premises in Lutyens Delhi by June 5. The plea was mentioned before Justice Avneesh Jhingan by Senior Advocate Abhishek Manu Singhvi, who sought urgent hearing.The judge agreed to list the case for hearing on May 26, Tuesday.The plea has been filed by Gymkhana club member Vijay Khurana.
